chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:
The board may adopt rules prescribing the method for payment of a fee for a permit issued by the department that authorizes the operation of a vehicle and its load or a combination of vehicles and load exceeding size or weight limitations. The rules may:

(1) authorize the use of electronic funds transfer or a credit card issued by:

(A) a financial institution chartered by a state or the federal government; or

(B) a nationally recognized credit organization approved by the board; and

(2) require the payment of a discount or service charge for a credit card payment in addition to the fee.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.356 — Form of Payment

The board may adopt rules prescribing the method for payment of a fee for a permit issued by the department that authorizes the operation of a vehicle and its load or a combination of vehicles and load exceeding size or weight limitations. The rules may:

    (1) authorize the use of electronic funds transfer or a credit card issued by:

        (A) a financial institution chartered by a state or the federal government; or

        (B) a nationally recognized credit organization approved by the board; and

    (2) require the payment of a discount or service charge for a credit card payment in addition to the fee.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 63, eff. September 1, 2011.*
